title: Connecticut General Statutes § 53a-54e — Construction of statutes re capital felony committed prior to April 25, 2012
text: The provisions of subsection (t) of section 1-1 and section 54-194 shall apply and be given full force and effect with respect to a capital felony committed prior to April 25, 2012, under the provisions of section 53a-54b in effect prior to April 25, 2012.
